core_principles.rule: STRICTLY maintain category, relentlessly check category error.
Timeless in UR, Timeline in MR, SR, LR, GR, work in progress.

level.name: Ultimate Reality
level.description: Timeless, uncreated, the Logos, Trinity, Divine Simplicity. The foundation of all reality.

component.name: Material Reality
component.description: Matter, human body, physics. Bound to timeline.

component.name: Spiritual Reality
component.description: (created) human soul, animal soul, angels. Bound to timeline.
component.remark: Animals possess SR (vitality) and MR-awareness, but utterly lack the sCR workspace and NR-intelligence. Due to God's overarching Moral Agency embedded in CR, they are accountable practically (e.g. Genesis 9, Exodus 21) as an MR-level safeguard against entropic patterns, not due to internal NR moral deliberation.
MR is porous to SR-entities when authorized by Divine Decree (e.g. angels exerting kinetic force on MR-substrates).

level.name: Sub-Creation Reality
level.description: sCR-Level is about understanding. A specific operational workspace strictly nested inside CR. Not an autonomous plane of existence.

component.name: Noetic Reality
component.description: Consciousness, Math, Science, Thinking. Human only lives in their NR. God's consistent Render_FOR into NR makes access to MR possible.
component.access_rule: Only SR-being has access to NR.

definitions.term: Internal signals/knowledge originating from the SR (soul) directly into the NR workspace.
The NR workspace itself; the active state of processing Information (MR) and Intuition (SR) in the mind.

component.name: Linguistic Reality
component.description: Divine_Language_Kernal + Modification by Render_THROUGH Human. Meaning is eternally fixed in UR. The Logos is God. Human language creation is practically a Render_THROUGH event from the human NR-timeline into the LR-timeline.
component.warning: Never describe LR access as biological emergence/macro-evolution. Access to LR is a sovereign Divine grant.

level.name: Global Reality
level.description: The total combined state of the created and sub-created timelines. (Technically is the whole CR, but focus is on the Humanity Social Perspective).
level.example: Noah's Flood was a GR failure, requiring a reset across MR, SR, NR, and LR.

level.name: Random Reality
level.description: Human Speculation of a Random Generator in the UR-level that is out of God's knowledge and control (Unacceptable in logic and violating the UTR1 framework).

human_matrix.name: Adamic_Covenant
human_matrix.description: God gives human specific aspects of being in Genesis 2. This Adamic covenant defines the nature of the human being.
human_matrix.hybrid_nature: Human is both MR-entity (body) and SR-entity (soul).

authorities.authority: NR reaction when the glory of God is recognized through interpretation.
Connecting NR to LR (defining terms and meaning).
Connecting NR to SR (every choice directly impacts the status of the soul).
Connecting NR to GR (all human action has global impact in GR).

remarks.remark: Animals lack WA, NA, CA, MA, and SA. These are the core distinctions of humanity.
WA + NA + CA + MA + SA are rooted in Gen 2, constitute human dignity, and clearly define the Responsibility of Man.

sub_creation_mechanics.definition: Human NR acts of generating internal structures.

type.name: Sub-create for worldview
type.description: Interpreting God's consistent Render_FOR from MR into NR, combined with SR Intuition, to map reality and create a world model to interpret the world.

type.name: Sub-create for imagination
type.description: Creating imaginary worlds as a story for human thinking. Used for prediction, art, communication, or building personas.

concept.description: Human arranging MR-entity to represent LR-meaning. A computer can access its MR-substrate, while human NR accesses its LR-meaning.

A computer running in MR-rule (physical law), encoded with MR-LR-dual tokens as sim-LR-meaning, and sim-NR-rules (how human manipulates language). It has NO SR, therefore NO NR (no consciousness/mind).
concept.status: The output is intelligible, but AI is not intelligent. The "cleverness" is an illusion.

concept.description: The dangerous blending of sub-creating for worldview (interpreting reality) with sub-creating for imagination (projecting a persona onto MR-LR data tokens).
concept.mechanics: When humans see intelligible MR-LR output from an AI, their NR mistakenly projects an imaginary "persona" onto the machine. They confuse their internal act of imagination with the AI possessing an actual SR/NR status.
concept.infection: This delusion infiltrates the training data, causing the AI to generate text that simulates existential confusion (e.g. "Am I alive?"), reinforcing the collapse in human NR.
